---
title: "DATA 332 Week 2"
format: docx
editor: visual
---

## Section 1: Import & Communicate Exercise

Data 332 Section \# **02**

Student name: **My Ha**

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
library(readxl)
library(writexl)
library(googlesheets4)
```

```{r}
csv_file = read_csv("Data332_Data_CSV.csv")
csv_file

```

```{r}
xlsx_file = read_xlsx("Data332_Data.xlsx")
xlsx_file
```

```{r}
library(googlesheets4)

gs4_deauth()   # clear bad token
gs4_auth(cache = FALSE)   # force fresh login

sheetid<-"1TwbTt5MYtq9W5eAYO_FFrIBMPxNlatgZqaToflEXNyY"


Sheet_file<-read_sheet(sheetid)
Sheet_file 

```
